---
title: "Lagrange Polynomial Interpolation and Approximation"
bibliography: ../../../references.bib
---

← [Numerical Methods](../)

Source inspiration: [@mathewsSite].

## Description

Lagrange interpolation builds a unique polynomial of degree at most $n$ through $n+1$ data points. In barycentric form, it is numerically stable and efficient for evaluation while keeping the same interpolant.

Given nodes $(x_i, y_i)$, the interpolation polynomial is

$$
P_n(x)=\sum_{i=0}^{n} y_i L_i(x), \qquad
L_i(x)=\prod_{j\ne i} \frac{x-x_j}{x_i-x_j}.
$$

The 29 animations below follow the legacy Mathews case ordering and use equally spaced nodes on the listed node intervals.

## Animations

Each animation increases polynomial degree one step at a time for a fixed function and interval.

[Julia source for all cases](lagnewt_animations_all.jl)

### Case 01

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 01 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt01.gif)

### Case 02

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 02 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt02.gif)

### Case 03

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 03 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt03.gif)

### Case 04

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 04 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt04.gif)

### Case 05

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 05 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt05.gif)

### Case 06

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 06 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt06.gif)

### Case 07

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 07 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt07.gif)

### Case 08

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 08 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt08.gif)

### Case 09

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 09 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt09.gif)

### Case 10

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 10 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt10.gif)

### Case 11

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 11 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt11.gif)

### Case 12

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 12 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt12.gif)

### Case 13

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 13 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt13.gif)

### Case 14

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 14 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt14.gif)

### Case 15

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 15 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt15.gif)

### Case 16

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 16 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt16.gif)

### Case 17

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 17 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt17.gif)

### Case 18

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 18 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt18.gif)

### Case 19

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 19 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt19.gif)

### Case 20

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 20 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt20.gif)

### Case 21

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 21 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt21.gif)

### Case 22

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 22 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt22.gif)

### Case 23

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 23 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt23.gif)

### Case 24

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 24 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt24.gif)

### Case 25

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 25 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt25.gif)

### Case 26

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 26 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt26.gif)

### Case 27

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 27 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt27.gif)

### Case 28

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 28 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt28.gif)

### Case 29

![Lagrange interpolation animation for case 29 from the legacy function-and-interval list.](lagnewt29.gif)

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added for interpolation error bounds and node-placement effects.
